rulings.Case Title: JAMES T. WEEG et al VS. WALTER GIBEAU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Deft For Judgment On The Pleadings Re The Pltf'S Complaint;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 9, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT WALTER GIBEAU's Motion Of Defendant For Judgment On The Pleadings Re The Plaintiff's Complaint GRANTED. CCP 366.3 applies to Plaintiff's claim/action which arises out of decedent's oral promise to make a testamentary distribution from his estate. Plaintiffs failed to bring their claim within one year of death. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: GSQUARED RESTAURANT VENTURES, LLC VS. COCOA DEVELOPMENT RETAIL, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 9, 2013, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT GSQUARED RESTAURANT VENTURES, LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT Continued to September 10, 2013 on Court's own motion. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: GUILLERMO FERNANDEZ et al VS. RICKY CHEN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 9, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT RICKY CHEN and AMIN WU's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED as follows: Motion to Strike is GRANTED as to payer for attorney's fees without prejudice. Plaintiff may move to amend the complaint if and when Defendants raise the issue of contract enforceability in their answer. Motion to Strike is GRANTED as to line 17-18 of Complaint. Plaintiffs fail to cite any authority for their broad interpretation of the Rent Ordinance. Additionally there are no allegations in Complaint that Defendants attempted to recover possession under "no-fault" provisions of the Rent Ordinance and that Defendant's alleged attempt to recover possession occurred after Plaintiffs have resided at the unit for 12 or more months. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: MEI YAN LEI VS. MARK FLANAGAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 9, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT MARK FLANAGAN's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Hearing Required. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: DIERDRE CHIN VS. KEVIN MOHANNA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 9, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT KEVIN MOHANNA and VIVIEN MOHANNA's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend to reconcile in good faith allegations in the Notice and Second Amended Complaint, specifically notice alleges that plaintiff is the landlord and second amended complaint alleges that plaintiff in the authorized agent for the landlord. Overruled as to other grounds. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: BROMAN ENTERPRISES, LLC VS. YAEL AMYRA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 9, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT YAEL AMYRA and DE KOK, DIRK's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend. Motion to Strike is granted as to 17f with leave to amend to reconcile the date for holdover damages with expiration of "Notice to Quit." No cause of action for trespass is alleged. Motion is GRANTED as to 17g. Contrary to allegations in 12 of the Complaint there is no Attachment 12 with "specific facts supporting a claim" attached to the complaint. Even though such allegations do appear in Attachment 15, it is insufficient as unlawful detainer requires strict procedural compliance. = (501/HMD)
